summary: The creation boundary is identified, but semantics, quality thresholds, stable ports, lineage, policy, rollback, and approval evidence remain incomplete.

findings.finding: No stable output port or interface version was supplied.
findings.correction: Define the governed product port, interface, version, and runtime binding before review.

enforcement_tests.test: Measure output observation time against the latest accepted input and published target.
enforcement_tests.failure_outcome: Block product go-live for pre-release failure; raise a product SLO breach after publication.
enforcement_tests.evidence_authority: Product CI and data observability service

next_actions.action: Define the stable output port and versioned interface.
Complete semantic, quality, lineage, policy, and rollback terms.
